entry.subtopic: Immediate Clarification of the Contextual Error
entry.reasoning:
Use concrete examples and avoid abstract speculation.

## Constraints
- Do not use markdown formatting.
- Do not use technical jargon unless clearly defined in context.
- Do not invent sources or misattribute claims.
- Keep all claims verifiable through standard academic sources (e.g., Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy, Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy, Cambridge Companions, JSTOR).
- Do not reference any non-existent or hypothetical sources.
